budget_vs_actual.cost_code: Job #2020 — SRM Bellevue @ Main Apartments  •  GC: Exxel Pacific / Owner: Bellevue Way Ventures  •  Bellevue, WA
Canonical source: 2020 Job Detail Report.pdf (352 pages, OWP Sage Timberline export)
Unit count (288) confirmed by TWO source documents:
1) Bellevue Main – Pricing to go to 101 Taylor Fixtures.xlsx: Type B lavs qty=268, Type A lavs qty=20, Lav faucets qty=288, Bathtub trim qty=288
2) BELLEVUE TRIM QUOTE PRICING organized by category USE.xlsx: Mansfield toilets 268 + 20 ADA = 288
Kitchen fixtures: 257 kitchen faucets (Delta 4353-AR-DST) — 31 fewer than units (studios/amenity)
Contract: One Way Plumbing Executed Contract OCR_D.pdf — Exxel Pacific / SRM Development GC
Billing: 10 archived Schedule of Values files (pay apps #4, 9, 10, 12, 13, 15, 18, 19, 20, 23)
Final contract $2,858,341 after 11 COs (net -$260,659, primarily CO#1 cast iron credit -$389,000)

insights.title: Labor overran budget by 12.8%
insights.finding: Total labor actual $766,929 vs budget $680,013 — $86,916 unfavorable variance. Review crew mix and productivity.

insights.title: Largest variance — cost code 220 (Roughin Material) under by $125,817
insights.finding: Budget $213,718, actual $87,901 (-58.9%). Flag for bid calibration.

change_log.subject: GAP: CO #1 and CO #2 not found in any extracted folder; may exist in archived OLD DROPBOX FILES subdirectories.
GAP: 206+ submittal documents but no formal resubmission log; tracked only by ORIGINAL/RESPONSE folder structure.

56 RFIs in primary folder (duplicates across 4 extracted instances totaling 282 occurrences). RFI range #027-#258. Focus: structural, concrete, shearwall, countertop, column conflicts, drainage, flashing.

TIES = within $1 or 5 hrs  •  WITHIN = within 5%  •  OFF = investigate
K. CHANGE LOG ↔ ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS
N. CHANGE LOG ↔ METRIC REGISTRY (event counts)
12 analytical tabs + Change Log + Root Cause Analysis + Predictive Signals + Metric Registry + Reconciliation
Canonical source: 2020 Job Detail Report.pdf (Sage Timberline export)
Change artifacts: folders scanned — ASI-RFI, Change Orders, Submittals, Invoices (Backcharges), JDR cost codes
Every Change Log row cites its source document path
TIES = within $1/5hrs/exact count  •  WITHIN = within 5%  •  OFF = investigate
Cross-sheet formulas (='Tab'!Cell) update automatically when source tabs change
